items.hook: He has performed as a concert guitarist and as soloist with orchestras at international music festivals and venues including Carnegie Hall and the 92nd St.
items.body: David Leisner is an American classical guitarist, composer and teacher whose activities include recording, arranging and writing about music. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The 272-metre (892 ft) long ship was built at Daewoo Shipbuilding & Marine Engineering in Okpo, South Korea in 2004/2005.
items.body: Monte Sarmiento is a container ship owned and operated by Aliança Navegação, a subsidiary of A.P. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Raymond Briggs’s library goes on sale at his local Oxfam shop
items.body:
Books belonging to the beloved creator of The Snowman and When the Wind Blows were donated by his estate after his death

items.hook: Lectionary 154, designated by siglum ℓ 154 is a Greek manuscript of the New Testament, on parchment leaves.
items.body: Palaeographically it has been assigned to the 13th century. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: The Invite review – A-list ensemble electrify hilarious couples night gone wrong comedy
items.body:

items.hook: Kōkichi Nishimura was a Japanese soldier and businessman who devoted his post-retirement years to traveling to Papua New Guinea to recover the remains of his former comrades and other Japanese soldiers who died during World War II.
items.body: His life was described in the 2008 book The Bone Man of Kokoda by Australian journalist Charles Happell. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Albian Hajdari is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for German Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim.
items.body: Born in Switzerland, he represented that nation at youth and senior international levels, before switching to play for the Kosovo national team in 2025. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Noor Aishah binti Mohammad Salim, commonly known as Puan Noor Aishah, was the wife of Yusof Ishak, the first president of Singapore.
items.body: She took the role as First Lady of Singapore between 1965 and 1970. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: The AACTA International Award for Best Actor is an award that is presented by the Australian Academy of Cinema and Television Arts (AACTA), for a performance by a male actor in a film made outside Australia.
items.body: It was first handed out by the Academy after its establishment in 2011 by the Australian Film Institute (AFI), to replace the AFI International Award for Best Actor (2005–2010). Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Venus, Vanishing by Rebecca Birrell review – art, desire and the rise of the Third Reich
items.body:
